title: Opening Talk with Zac Williamson | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
In this opening talk, Zac Williamson, Co-founder of Aztec Network, introduces Noir and the vision behind the Private World Computer.

From permissionless innovation to real-world privacy, this session explores how Noir and Aztec enable fully private, composable applications and why the technology powering them is already here.
